words.zh: n. 種, 類, 外形

words.def: a separate part of a whole
words.zh: n. 塊, 片, 篇, 碎片, 部分, 部件, 標準量

words.def: a long narrative poem telling of a hero's deeds
a form of entertainment that enacts a story by sound and a sequence of images giving the illusion of continuous movement
words.zh: n. 照片, 圖片, 影片

words.def: the seat within a bishop's diocese where his cathedral is located
words.zh: vt. 看見, 檢視, 參觀, 遊覽, 理解, 知道, 同意

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂

words.def: 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites
